subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Desired One Who hath created through utterance, drawn souls through speech, and through His blessed Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزا که ببیان خلق نمود و بگفتار جذب فرمود و بکلمه مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
